# Volume I — Quote-forward chapter pilot (ch01–ch02)

**Intent:** Chapters where **most words are verbatim lecture excerpts** (blockquotes), with **short book-voice glosses** between blocks for orientation, thesis, and bridges. Fair use / publisher clearance remains **operator responsibility** before commercial publication.

**Pilot scope:** `chapters/ch01/draft.md`, `chapters/ch02/draft.md` (2026-04).

**Contrast:** `BOOK-QUALITY-DOCTRINE.md` still applies to **glosses** (plain, falsifiable bridges); quoted material is **primary text**, not summarized away.
